text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I inform Mihono Bourbon of our plans<n>for promo
concerts and training<n>leading up to the Grand
Concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make it clear that I'm not ordering<n>her to take
part—she should only join<n>if she wants to. But she
seems rather<n>unsure of herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, if she ever decides she wants<n>to perform,
we can talk about getting<n>her up on stage then.
